query:
SELECT pb.packagingType, pb.piecesPerBox, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight, pb.cbm
FROM package_boxes pb
JOIN product_variants pv ON pb.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-005-OAK-V010';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT pb.packagingType, pb.piecesPerBox, pb.grossWeight, pb.netWeight, pb.cbm
FROM package_boxes pb
JOIN product_variants pv ON pb.variantId = pv.id
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-005-OAK-V010';
